           EJECT                                                           
    
       01  WS-PARM-CARD.                                                   
    
           03  WS-PARM-DB                 PIC  X(03).                      
    
           03  FILLER                     PIC  X.                          
    
           03  WS-PARM-DB-KEY             PIC  X(01).                      
    
           03  FILLER                     PIC  X.                          
    
           03  WS-PARM-BEGIN-KEY          PIC  X(37).                      
    
           03  WS-PARM-END-KEY            PIC  X(37).                      
    
       01  WS-PARM-CARD-2.                                                 
    
           03  WS-PARM-POSX               PIC  X(04).                      
    
           03  WS-PARM-POS   REDEFINES WS-PARM-POSX                        
    
                                          PIC  9(04).                      
    
           03  WS-PARM-COLON              PIC  X(01).                      
    
           03  WS-PARM-LX                 PIC  X(04).                      
    
           03  WS-PARM-L     REDEFINES WS-PARM-LX                          
    
                                          PIC  9(04).                      
    
           03  WS-PARM-VAL                PIC  X.                          
    
               88 WS-PARM-VALID-LITERAL   VALUE ' '  '0' '='.              
    
           03  WS-PARM-CHAR-STRING        PIC  X(57).                      
    
      *-->    SIGNED NUMERICS:   00000{  =  +0                             
    
           03  WS-PARM-CPA-KEY            PIC  X(08).                      
    
           03  WS-PARM-CPA-CTR-X          PIC  X(05).                      
    
           03  WS-PARM-CPA-CTR    REDEFINES                                
    
               WS-PARM-CPA-CTR-X          PIC  9(05).                      
    
           SKIP2                                                           
    
       01  TAB-PARM-CARD.                                                  
    
           03  TAB-PARM-TABLE   OCCURS  20.                                
    
               05  TAB-PARM-POS                PIC  9(04).                 
    
               05  TAB-PARM-COLON              PIC  X(01).                 
    
               05  TAB-PARM-L                  PIC  9(04).                 
    
               05  TAB-PARM-VAL                PIC  X.                     
    
               05  TAB-PARM-CHAR-STRING        PIC  X(57).                 
    
               05  TAB-PARM-CPA-KEY            PIC  X(08).                 
    
               05  TAB-PARM-CPA-CTR            PIC  X(05).                 
    
           SKIP2                                                           
    
       01  X                               PIC  X(57).                     
    
       01  WS-CURR-DATE.                                                   
    
               05  WS-CURR-YY             PIC 9(2).                        
    
               05  FILLER                 PIC 9(4).                        
    
           SKIP2                                                           
    
       01  RESTART-FLAG                PIC 9     VALUE  0.                 
    
           88  NO-RESTART              VALUE  0.                           
    
           88  DB-RESTART              VALUE  1.                           
    
       01  PARM-EXP-SW                 PIC 9     VALUE  0.                 
    
           88  PARM-EXP-1              VALUE  1.                           
    
           88  PARM-EXP-2              VALUE  2.                           
    
       01  PARM-EOF-SW                 PIC 9     VALUE  0.                 
    
           88  PARM-EOF              VALUE  1.                             
    
           EJECT                                                           
    
      *-INC ACS005C                                                        
    
           EJECT                                                           
    
                                                                           
    
       01  PROGRAM-USER-ID             PIC X(32).                          
    
                                                                           
    
       01  DB-REC-AREA.                                                    
    
      *-INC DDENA01                                                        
    
           05  FILLER    PIC X(2000).                                      
    
           EJECT                                                           
    
                                                                           
    
      *--------------------------------------------------------------      
    
      *     CPA DATA AREA                                           *      
    
      *                                                             *      
    
      *--------------------------------------------------------------      
    
                                                                           
    
       01  LOG-CONTROL-AREA.                                               
    
           05  LOG-??????-COUNTERS.                                        
    
               13  LOG-DB-READ-CTR            PIC 9(12) VALUE ZERO.        
    
               13  LOG-DB-UPD-CTR             PIC 9(12) VALUE ZERO.        
    
           05  LOG-DB-RQ-AREA                  PIC  X(256).                
    
      /                                                                    
    
      *---------------------------------------------------------------*    
    
      *    CIBOPS   ( INTERFACE WITH THE CONSOLE OPERATOR             *    
    
      *                 TO SEE IF THE JOB SHOULD BE STOPPED )         *    
    
      *---------------------------------------------------------------*    
    
                                                                           
    
       01  CIBOPS-WORK-AREA.                                               
    
           05  CIBOPS-FUNC     PIC  XXXX          VALUE  'STRT'.           
    
           05  CIBOPS-ANSWER   PIC  X(128).                                
    
           05  CIBOPS-RC       PIC  S9(09)  COMP  VALUE  ZERO.             
    
                                                                           
    
      *---------------------------------------------------------------*    
    
      *   CPA                                                         *    
    
      *---------------------------------------------------------------*    
    
                                                                           
    
       01  CPA-CTR                    PIC  9(9)  COMP  VALUE  0.           
    
       01  INTERVAL-CTR               PIC  9(9)  COMP  VALUE  0.           
    
       01  PARM-CTR                   PIC  9(9)  COMP  VALUE  0.           
    
       01  TAB-CTR                    PIC  9(9)  COMP  VALUE  0.           
    
           EJECT                                                           
    
       01  CPA01-RECORD-LIST.                                              
    
-INC DDCPA01                                                               
    
           EJECT                                                           
    
                                                                           
    
       01  ABEND-RQ-AREA.                                                  
    
           03  ABEND-RQ-CMD            PIC X(5).                           
    
           03  ABEND-RQ-FILE           PIC X(3).                           
    
           03  ABEND-RQ-KEY-NAME       PIC X(5).                           
    
           03  ABEND-RQ-RETURN         PIC X(2).                           
    
           03  ABEND-RQ-FILLER         PIC X(1).                           
    
           03  ABEND-DB-ID             PIC X(2).                           
    
           03  ABEND-RECORD-ID         PIC X(7).                           
    
           03  ABEND-RESERVED          PIC X(51).                          
    
           03  ABEND-RQ-KEY-VALUE      PIC X(40).                          
    
           SKIP2                                                           
    
       01  ??????-DB-AREAS.                                                
    
           SKIP2                                                           
    
               05  DB-RQ-AREA.                                             
    
                   07  DB-RQ-CMD            PIC X(5).                      
    
                   07  DB-RQ-FILE           PIC X(3).                      
    
                   07  DB-RQ-KEY-NAME       PIC X(5).                      
    
                   07  DB-RQ-RETURN         PIC X(2).                      
    
                       88  DB-EOF           VALUE '14'  '19'.              
    
                   07  DB-FILLER            PIC X.                         
    
                   07  DB-ID                PIC X(2).                      
    
                   07  DB-RQ-REC-ID         PIC X(7).                      
    
                   07  DB-RQ-RESERVED       PIC X(51).                     
    
                   07  DB-RQ-KEY-VALUE      PIC X(180).                    
    
           SKIP2                                                           
    
               05  DB-ELT-LIST              PIC X(12).                     
    
           SKIP2                                                           
    
               05  SAVE-DB-RQ-AREA          PIC X(256).                    
    
           EJECT                                                           
    
       01  CPA-RQ-AREA.                                                    
    
           03 CPA-RQ-CMD             PIC  X(5)  VALUE SPACES.              
    
           03 CPA-RQ-FILE            PIC  XXX   VALUE SPACES.              
    
           03 CPA-RQ-KEY-NAME        PIC  X(5)  VALUE SPACES.              
    
           03 CPA-RQ-RTCODE          PIC  XX    VALUE SPACES.              
    
           03 FILLER                 PIC  X     VALUE SPACES.              
    
           03 CPA-DB-ID              PIC  XX    VALUE SPACES.              
    
           03 CPA-RECORD-ID          PIC  X(7)  VALUE SPACES.              
    
           03 CPA-RESERVED           PIC  X(51) VALUE SPACES.              
    
           03  CPA-RQ-KEY-VALUE      PIC  X(180).                          
    
       01  CPA01-ELT-LIST.                                                 
    
           03  CPA01-ELEMENT-LIST     PIC  X(5)  VALUE  'CPA01'.           
    
           03  FILLER                 PIC  X(7)  VALUE  SPACES.            
    
       01  COMIT-RQ-AREA.                                                  
    
           02 COMIT-RQ-CMD           PIC X(05)  VALUE 'COMIT'.             
    
           02 COMIT-FILLER           PIC X(251) VALUE LOW-VALUES.          
    
           EJECT                                                           
    
      *---------------------------------------------------------------*    
    
       PROCEDURE DIVISION.                                                 
    
           ENTRY 'DBMSCBL'.                                                
    
                                                                           
    
       AA100-MAINLINE.                                                     
    
                                                                           
    
           DISPLAY  '** START '  THIS-LCS-PGM.                             
    
                                                                           
    
           PERFORM  AA110-INITIALIZE            THRU  AA110-EXIT.          
    
                                                                           
    
           PERFORM  AA150-CHECK-RESTART         THRU  AA150-EXIT.          
    
                                                                           
    
             PERFORM BA100-PROCESS-ENA          THRU  BA100-EXIT.          
    
                                                                           
    
           IF (JOB-ABEND)                                                  
    
               DISPLAY '*** ?????? INVOKED ABEND ***'                      
    
               CALL 'ABEND'.                                               
    
                                                                           
    
                                                                           
    
           PERFORM AA140-END-PROCESSING          THRU AA140-EXIT.          
    
                                                                           
    
           IF (JOB-ABEND)                                                  
    
               DISPLAY '*** ?????? INVOKED ABEND ***'                      
    
               CALL 'ABEND'                                                
    
           END-IF.                                                         
    
                                                                           
    
           DISPLAY  '** END   '  THIS-LCS-PGM.                             
    
                                                                           
    
       AA100-GOBACK.                                                       
    
           GOBACK.                                                         
    
           EJECT                                                           
    
       AA110-INITIALIZE.                                                   
    
                                                                           
    
      **** IF  NOT RESTART                                                 
    
             OPEN   INPUT                                                  
    
                      PARMIN                                               
    
             DISPLAY  '** OPENING FILES '                                  
    
                                                                           
    
           MOVE SPACES                 TO TAB-PARM-CARD.                   
    
           MOVE ZEROS                  TO WS-FLAGS.                        
    
           MOVE ONE                    TO FIRST-DB-CHECK                   
    
                                          PARM-EXP-SW.                     
    
           PERFORM CA200-PARM-EDIT     THRU CA200-EXIT                     
    
              UNTIL  PARM-EOF.                                             
    
           PERFORM CA250-PARM-DISPLAY  THRU CA250-EXIT                     
    
              VARYING  TAB-CTR  FROM  1  BY  1                             
    
                 UNTIL TAB-PARM-TABLE (TAB-CTR)  =  SPACES                 
    
K03                AND  TAB-CTR  >  1.                                     
    
                                                                           
    
           PERFORM  BC260-CALL-CIBOPS  THRU  BC260-EXIT.                   
    
                                                                           
    
       AA110-EXIT.                                                         
    
           EXIT.                                                           
    
           EJECT                                                           
    
           SKIP3                                                           
    
       AA120-SET-DB-KEY.                                                   
    
                                                                           
    
           IF  DB-RESTART                                                  
    
               MOVE  LOG-DB-RQ-AREA    TO  DB-RQ-AREA                      
    
           ELSE                                                            
    
      **       MOVE FY-FIRST-DAY       TO  DB-RQ-KEY-VALUE.                
    
               MOVE WS-PARM-BEGIN-KEY  TO  DB-RQ-KEY-VALUE                 
    
           END-IF.                                                         
    
           MOVE WS-PARM-DB            TO  DB-RQ-FILE                       
    
                                          DB-RQ-KEY-NAME                   
    
                                          DB-ELT-LIST                      
    
           MOVE   'K'                 TO  DB-RQ-KEY-NAME  (4:1)            
    
           MOVE WS-PARM-DB-KEY        TO  DB-RQ-KEY-NAME  (5:1)            
    
           MOVE '01'                  TO  DB-ELT-LIST     (4:2).           
    
                                                                           
    
           IF UPD-MODE                                                     
    
              MOVE  'RDUKG'           TO  DB-RQ-CMD                        
    
             ELSE                                                          
    
              MOVE  'REDKG'           TO  DB-RQ-CMD                        
    
           END-IF.                                                         
    
      *                                                                    
    
           MOVE  SPACES                TO  DB-RQ-RETURN.                   
    
           DISPLAY  '** '  WS-PARM-DB                                      
    
                    ' RECORD DOMAIN: '                                     
    
                      DB-RQ-KEY-VALUE  (1:37)                              
    
                    ' THRU '  WS-PARM-END-KEY.                             
    
                                                                           
    
           DISPLAY  ' '.                                                   
    
           DISPLAY  '--> ORIGINAL DB REQ AREA: '                           
    
                    DB-RQ-AREA.                                            
    
                                                                           
    
       AA120-EXIT.                                                         
    
           EXIT.                                                           
    
           EJECT                                                           
    
       AA140-END-PROCESSING.                                               
    
                                                                           
    
      *    IF  NO-RESTART                                                  
    
      *      DISPLAY  'CLOSING THE DISP=(NEW,CATLG) FILES '                
    
               CLOSE PARMIN                                                
    
      *              REDLINE-REPT                                          
    
                                                                           
    
           PERFORM CA300-DISPLAY-COUNTERS THRU CA300-EXIT.                 
    
                                                                           
    
           IF  NOT  CIBOPS-STOP                                            
    
               PERFORM  BC250-UPDATE-CPA  THRU  BC250-EXIT                 
    
             ELSE                                                          
    
           IF  CIBOPS-STOP                                                 
    
              DISPLAY  '==> ?????? SHOULD RESTART FROM DB KEY '            
    
                       DB-RQ-KEY-VALUE.                                    
    
                                                                           
    
       AA140-EXIT.                                                         
    
           EXIT.                                                           
    
      /                                                                    
    
       AA150-CHECK-RESTART.                                                
    
                                                                           
    
           MOVE  REDKX      TO  CPA-RQ-CMD.                                
    
           MOVE  WS-PARM-CPA-KEY TO  CPA-RQ-KEY-VALUE.                     
    
                                                                           
    
           PERFORM  BC257-CALL-CPA.                                        
    
                                                                           
    
           IF  CPA-RQ-RTCODE  =  SPACES                                    
    
               NEXT SENTENCE                                               
    
           ELSE                                                            
    
              DISPLAY '** NO CPA RECORD, WILL ADD CPA RECORD'              
    
              MOVE  WS-PARM-CPA-KEY     TO      CPA01-PROGRAM-ID           
    
              MOVE  'ADDIT'          TO      CPA-RQ-CMD                    
    
              MOVE  SPACES           TO      CPA01-RESTART-CODE            
    
             MOVE    ZEROS           TO  LOG-??????-COUNTERS               
    
             MOVE  LOG-CONTROL-AREA  TO  CPA01-USER-DEFINED                
    
              PERFORM  BC257-CALL-CPA.                                     
    
                                                                           
    
           MOVE  CPA01-USER-DEFINED  TO  LOG-CONTROL-AREA.                 
    
                                                                           
    
           EVALUATE  CPA01-RESTART-CODE                                    
    
              WHEN  SPACES                                                 
    
                 MOVE  0  TO  RESTART-FLAG                                 
    
                 GO  TO  AA150-EXIT                                        
    
              WHEN  'PAUSED'                                               
    
              WHEN  'ABEND'                                                
    
                 DISPLAY '** RESTARTING JOB '                              
    
                 MOVE  LOG-??????-COUNTERS  TO  ??????-COUNTERS            
    
                 MOVE  1  TO  RESTART-FLAG                                 
    
              WHEN  OTHER                                                  
    
                 DISPLAY  '--> LAST JOB WAS NOT PROPERLY PAUSED '          
    
                 DISPLAY  '--> PLEASE RESTORE THE             '            
    
                          '  ..             '                              
    
                 DISPLAY  '      AND THE ''CPA'' RECORD '                  
    
                          ' (FROM ??????1)'                                
    
                 CALL  'ABEND'                                             
    
           END-EVALUATE.                                                   
    
                                                                           
    
      *    IF  RESTART-ENE                                                 
    
      *        DISPLAY  '** RESTART FROM DB KEY '  DBA-KEY                 
    
      *        MOVE  1  TO  RESTART-FLAG.                                  
    
      *    ELSE                                                            
    
      *       DISPLAY  '** BAD CPA RESTART FLAG '  LOG-RESTART-SW          
    
      *       DISPLAY  '**    ?????? ABEND   ***************** '           
    
      *       CALL  'ABEND'.                                               
    
                                                                           
    
       AA150-EXIT.                                                         
    
           EXIT.                                                           
    
           EJECT                                                           
    
       BA100-PROCESS-ENA.                                                  
    
                                                                           
    
           IF (JOB-ABEND)                                                  
    
               GO TO BA100-EXIT.                                           
    
                                                                           
    
           MOVE  'ENA'                   TO   READ-SW.                     
    
           MOVE  SPACES                  TO   DB-RQ-RETURN.                
    
      *-->                                                                 
    
           PERFORM  AA120-SET-DB-KEY   THRU  AA120-EXIT.                   
    
           PERFORM  BA110-ENA-DRIVER    THRU  BA110-EXIT                   
    
                  UNTIL  DB-EOF.                                           
    
                                                                           
    
       BA100-EXIT.                                                         
    
           EXIT.                                                           
    
           EJECT                                                           
    
       BA110-ENA-DRIVER.                                                   
    
                                                                           
    
           CALL  'DBNTRY'  USING  PROGRAM-USER-ID                          
    
                                  DB-RQ-AREA                               
    
                                  DB-REC-AREA                              
    
                                  DB-ELT-LIST.                             
    
JFK   *     DISPLAY ' RQ '        DB-RQ-AREA                               
    
                                                                           
    
                                                                           
    
           IF UPD-MODE                                                     
    
              MOVE  'RDUNX'           TO  DB-RQ-CMD                        
    
             ELSE                                                          
    
              MOVE  'REDNX'           TO  DB-RQ-CMD                        
    
           END-IF.                                                         
    
                                                                           
    
           EVALUATE  DB-RQ-RETURN                                          
    
             WHEN SPACES                                                   
    
               IF  DB-RQ-KEY-VALUE (1:37) >  WS-PARM-END-KEY               
    
                 SET DB-EOF TO TRUE                                        
    
                 GO  TO  BA110-EXIT                                        
    
               END-IF                                                      
    
             WHEN '14'                                                     
    
               GO  TO  BA110-EXIT                                          
    
             WHEN OTHER                                                    
    
               DISPLAY '* FATAL DB ERROR, REQ AREA: ' DB-RQ-AREA           
    
               DISPLAY '* DB RECORD               : ' DB-REC-AREA          
    
               CALL 'ABEND'                                                
    
           END-EVALUATE.                                                   
    
                                                                           
    
           ADD ONE TO DB-READ-CTR.                                         
    
                                                                           
    
       BA110-PARA2.                                                        
    
                                                                           
    
      *    MOVE SPACES         TO DB-REC-AREA   (544:18).                  
    
      *    MOVE SPACES         TO DB-REC-AREA   (POS:L).                   
    
                                                                           
    
           PERFORM  BA115-INIT-DB-FIELDS  THRU  BA115-EXIT                 
    
              VARYING  TAB-CTR  FROM  1  BY  1  UNTIL                      
    
                 TAB-PARM-TABLE (TAB-CTR)  =  SPACES.                      
    
      *                                                                    
    
           IF UPD-MODE                                                     
    
              MOVE  DB-RQ-AREA         TO SAVE-DB-RQ-AREA                  
    
              MOVE  'UPDAT'            TO DB-RQ-CMD                        
    
              PERFORM  BA127-CALL-ENA                                      
    
              ADD ONE TO DB-UPD-CTR                                        
    
              MOVE  SAVE-DB-RQ-AREA   TO DB-RQ-AREA                        
    
           END-IF.                                                         
    
                                                                           
    
           ADD  1  TO  CPA-CTR.                                            
    
           IF  CPA-CTR  >  INTERVAL-CTR                                    
    
               PERFORM  BC250-UPDATE-CPA  THRU  BC250-EXIT                 
    
           END-IF.                                                         
    
                                                                           
    
       BA110-EXIT.                                                         
    
           EXIT.                                                           
    
           EJECT                                                           
    
                                                                           
    
       BA115-INIT-DB-FIELDS.                                               
    
           EXIT.                                                           
    
                                                                           
    
           IF  TAB-PARM-TABLE (TAB-CTR)  =  SPACES                         
    
               GO TO BA115-EXIT                                            
    
            END-IF.                                                        
    
                                                                           
    
           COMPUTE  POS =  TAB-PARM-POS  (TAB-CTR).                        
    
           COMPUTE   L  =  TAB-PARM-L    (TAB-CTR).                        
    
                                                                           
    
           EVALUATE  TAB-PARM-VAL  (TAB-CTR)                               
    
             WHEN  '0'                                                     
    
                MOVE ALL '0'        TO DB-REC-AREA   (POS:L)               
    
             WHEN  SPACES                                                  
    
                MOVE ALL ' '        TO DB-REC-AREA   (POS:L)               
    
             WHEN  '='                                                     
    
                MOVE TAB-PARM-CHAR-STRING (TAB-CTR)                        
    
                                    TO DB-REC-AREA   (POS:L)               
    
           END-EVALUATE.                                                   
    
                                                                           
    
       BA115-EXIT.                                                         
    
           EXIT.                                                           
    
           EJECT                                                           
    
                                                                           
    
       BA127-CALL-ENA.                                                     
    
                                                                           
    
           CALL 'DBNTRY'         USING PROGRAM-USER-ID                     
    
                                       DB-RQ-AREA                          
    
                                       DB-REC-AREA                         
    
                                       DB-ELT-LIST.                        
    
                                                                           
    
           EVALUATE  DB-RQ-RETURN                                          
    
              WHEN  SPACES                                                 
    
                 CONTINUE                                                  
    
              WHEN  OTHER                                                  
    
                 DISPLAY '*** DB ERROR ON FILE ***' DB-RQ-AREA             
    
                 DISPLAY '*** DB RECORD        ***' DB-REC-AREA            
    
                 CALL 'ABEND'                                              
    
           END-EVALUATE.                                                   
    
           EJECT                                                           
    
                                                                           
    
                                                                           
    
      *BA135-PARMIN-REPT.                                                  
    
      *    PERFORM  BA126-FORMAT                                           
    
      *    WRITE  PARMIN-REPT-REC  FROM WS-REPT-REC.                       
    
      *BA135-EXIT.                                                         
    
      *    EXIT.                                                           
    
                                                                           
    
           EJECT                                                           
    
                                                                           
    
       BC250-UPDATE-CPA.                                                   
    
                                                                           
    
           PERFORM  BC260-CALL-CIBOPS  THRU  BC260-EXIT.                   
    
                                                                           
    
                MOVE  'RDUKX'    TO  CPA-RQ-CMD.                           
    
                MOVE  WS-PARM-CPA-KEY  TO CPA-RQ-KEY-VALUE.                
    
                                                                           
    
                PERFORM  BC257-CALL-CPA.                                   
    
                                                                           
    
           IF  CPA-RQ-RTCODE  =  SPACES                                    
    
               CONTINUE                                                    
    
             ELSE                                                          
    
               DISPLAY  ' NO CPA RECORD ABORTING RUN'                      
    
               DISPLAY  CPA-RQ-AREA                                        
    
               MOVE  '0011'  TO  RETURN-CODE                               
    
               STOP RUN.                                                   
    
                                                                           
    
      *    MOVE   MTH-LAST-DAY-X     TO   LOG-MTH-BEING-RUN-DATE.          
    
           IF  CIBOPS-STOP                                                 
    
             MOVE  'PAUSED'  TO  CPA01-RESTART-CODE                        
    
            ELSE                                                           
    
              IF  DB-EOF                                                   
    
                 MOVE   SPACES              TO  CPA01-RESTART-CODE         
    
               ELSE                                                        
    
                 MOVE   'ABEND'             TO  CPA01-RESTART-CODE.        
    
                                                                           
    
           MOVE     ??????-COUNTERS      TO  LOG-??????-COUNTERS           
    
           MOVE     DB-RQ-AREA           TO  LOG-DB-RQ-AREA                
    
           MOVE  LOG-CONTROL-AREA       TO  CPA01-USER-DEFINED.            
    
                                                                           
    
           MOVE  'UPDAT'    TO  CPA-RQ-CMD.                                
    
                                                                           
    
           PERFORM  BC257-CALL-CPA.                                        
    
                                                                           
    
           IF  CPA-RQ-RTCODE  =  SPACES                                    
    
               MOVE  0  TO  CPA-CTR                                        
    
           ELSE                                                            
    
               DISPLAY '** ?????? ABEND '                                  
    
               DISPLAY '** UPDATE TO CPA01 IN ERROR  '                     
    
               DISPLAY  CPA-RQ-AREA                                        
    
                MOVE  '0011'  TO  RETURN-CODE                              
    
               STOP RUN.                                                   
    
                                                                           
    
            MOVE  LOW-VALUES           TO  COMIT-FILLER.                   
    
            MOVE  'COMIT'              TO  COMIT-RQ-CMD.                   
    
            CALL  'DBNTRY'          USING  PROGRAM-USER-ID                 
    
                                           COMIT-RQ-AREA.                  
    
                                                                           
    
            IF  CIBOPS-STOP                                                
    
                PERFORM  AA140-END-PROCESSING  THRU  AA140-EXIT            
    
                MOVE  '0008'  TO  RETURN-CODE                              
    
                STOP  RUN.                                                 
    
                                                                           
    
       BC250-EXIT.                                                         
    
           EXIT.                                                           
    
           EJECT                                                           
    
                                                                           
    
       BC257-CALL-CPA.                                                     
    
                                                                           
    
           MOVE  'CPA01'    TO  CPA01-ELT-LIST.                            
    
           MOVE  'CPAK1'    TO  CPA-RQ-KEY-NAME.                           
    
           MOVE  'CPA'      TO  CPA-RQ-FILE.                               
    
                                                                           
    
           CALL  'DBNTRY'  USING  PROGRAM-USER-ID                          
    
                                  CPA-RQ-AREA                              
    
                                  CPA01-RECORD                             
    
                                  CPA01-ELT-LIST.                          
    
                                                                           
    
       BC257-EXIT.                                                         
    
           EXIT.                                                           
    
           EJECT                                                           
    
       BC260-CALL-CIBOPS.                                                  
    
                                                                           
    
      *---------------------------------------------------------------*    
    
      *  CIBOPS WILL CHECK THE CONSOLE OPERATOR'S BUFFER.             *    
    
      *  WHEN THE CONSOLE OPERATOR HAS ENTERED A 'P <JOBNAME>'        *    
    
      *    IT MEANS THAT THE CONSOLE OPERATOR WANTS TO STOP RUN.      *    
    
      *---------------------------------------------------------------*    
    
                                                                           
    
             CALL  'CIBOPS'                                                
    
                USING                                                      
    
                 CIBOPS-FUNC                                               
    
                 CIBOPS-ANSWER                                             
    
                 CIBOPS-RC.                                                
    
                                                                           
    
             IF  CIBOPS-RC  >  0  AND                                      
    
                 CIBOPS-FUNC  =  'QMOD'                                    
    
                DISPLAY  '===>  OPERATOR STOP COMMAND ''P'' RECVD'         
    
                DISPLAY  '===>  ?????? WILL STOP EXECUTION  '              
    
                MOVE  1  TO  CIBOPS-STOP-SW.                               
    
      **        PERFORM  AA140-END-PROCESSING  THRU  AA140-EXIT            
    
      **        STOP  RUN.                                                 
    
                                                                           
    
             MOVE  'QMOD'  TO  CIBOPS-FUNC.                                
    
       BC260-EXIT.                                                         
    
           EXIT.                                                           
    
           EJECT                                                           
    
      *BD100-WRITE-REPT-REC.                                               
    
           SKIP1                                                           
    
JFK   *     DISPLAY 'START BD100 '                                         
    
      *    MOVE ZEERO              TO WRITE-FLAG.                          
    
                                                                           
    
      *    IF  NO-RESTART                                                  
    
      *        WRITE REDLINE-REPT-REC    FROM  REPT-REC.                   
    
      *     ELSE                                                           
    
      *        WRITE AR17-RECORD-RSTRT  FROM  AR17-RECORD.                 
    
JFK   *     DISPLAY 'END   BD100 '.                                        
    
                                                                           
    
           SKIP1                                                           
    
      *BD100-EXIT.                                                         
    
      *    EXIT.                                                           
    
           EJECT                                                           
    
           SKIP2                                                           
    
           EJECT                                                           
    
                                                                           
    
                                                                           
    
       CA200-PARM-EDIT.                                                    
    
           SKIP1                                                           
    
           READ  PARMIN                                                    
    
             AT  END                                                       
    
               SET PARM-EOF  TO  TRUE                                      
    
               GO  TO  CA200-EXIT.                                         
    
                                                                           
    
           ADD  1  TO  PARM-CTR.                                           
    
           EVALUATE  PARM-CTR                                              
    
              WHEN  1                                                      
    
                 PERFORM  CA210-EDIT-PARM1  THRU  CA210-EXIT               
    
              WHEN  20                                                     
    
                 DISPLAY  '** FATAL ERR .. TOO MANY PARM CARDS '           
    
                 CALL  'ABEND'                                             
    
              WHEN  OTHER                                                  
    
                 PERFORM  CA220-EDIT-PARM2  THRU  CA220-EXIT               
    
           END-EVALUATE.                                                   
    
                                                                           
    
      *    ACCEPT  WS-PARM-CARD.                                           
    
      *    ACCEPT  WS-PARM-CARD-2.                                         
    
           SKIP1                                                           
    
       CA200-EXIT.                                                         
    
           EXIT.                                                           
    
           EJECT                                                           
    
                                                                           
    
       CA210-EDIT-PARM1.                                                   
    
                                                                           
    
           MOVE PARMIN-REC  TO  WS-PARM-CARD.                              
    
                                                                           
    
           IF  WS-PARM-END-KEY  =  SPACES                                  
    
              DISPLAY  'INVALID END KEY '  WS-PARM-CARD                    
    
              CALL  'ABEND'                                                
    
            END-IF.                                                        
    
                                                                           
    
           IF  WS-PARM-BEGIN-KEY  >  WS-PARM-END-KEY                       
    
              DISPLAY  ' BEGIN KEY TOO HIGH ' WS-PARM-CARD                 
    
              CALL  'ABEND'                                                
    
            END-IF.                                                        
    
                                                                           
    
       CA210-EXIT.                                                         
    
           EXIT.                                                           
    
                                                                           
    
       CA220-EDIT-PARM2.                                                   
    
                                                                           
    
           MOVE PARMIN-REC  TO  WS-PARM-CARD-2.                            
    
                                                                           
    
           IF  NOT WS-PARM-VALID-LITERAL                                   
    
              DISPLAY  'INVALID PARM LITERAL '  WS-PARM-CARD-2             
    
              CALL  'ABEND'                                                
    
            END-IF.                                                        
    
                                                                           
    
           IF  WS-PARM-VAL  =  '='                                         
    
            IF WS-PARM-CHAR-STRING = SPACES                                
    
              DISPLAY  'INVALID PARM STRING  '  WS-PARM-CARD-2             
    
              CALL  'ABEND'                                                
    
            END-IF.                                                        
    
                                                                           
    
           IF  WS-PARM-POSX  NOT NUMERIC                                   
    
              DISPLAY  'INVALID PARM POS '  WS-PARM-CARD-2                 
    
              CALL  'ABEND'                                                
    
             ELSE                                                          
    
              COMPUTE POS =  WS-PARM-POS                                   
    
            END-IF.                                                        
    
                                                                           
    
           IF  WS-PARM-LX    NOT NUMERIC                                   
    
              DISPLAY  'INVALID PARM LENGTH '  WS-PARM-CARD-2              
    
              CALL  'ABEND'                                                
    
             ELSE                                                          
    
              COMPUTE  L  =  WS-PARM-L                                     
    
            END-IF.                                                        
    
                                                                           
    
      *    ACCEPT  WS-CURR-DATE  FROM  DATE.                               
    
                                                                           
    
           EVALUATE  PARM-CTR                                              
    
             WHEN  2                                                       
    
               IF  WS-PARM-CPA-KEY = SPACES  OR                            
    
                   WS-PARM-CPA-KEY (1:1) = SPACES                          
    
                   DISPLAY  'INVALID PARM CPA KEY '  WS-PARM-CARD-2        
    
                   CALL  'ABEND'                                           
    
               END-IF                                                      
    
               IF  WS-PARM-DB  =  'CPA'    AND                             
    
                   WS-PARM-CPA-KEY = WS-PARM-BEGIN-KEY (1:8)               
    
                   DISPLAY  '** FATAL CPA CONFLICT '  WS-PARM-CARD-2       
    
                   CALL  'ABEND'                                           
    
               END-IF                                                      
    
                                                                           
    
               IF  WS-PARM-CPA-CTR-X  NUMERIC  AND                         
    
                   WS-PARM-CPA-CTR    >  1                                 
    
                   MOVE  WS-PARM-CPA-CTR  TO  INTERVAL-CTR                 
    
                ELSE                                                       
    
                   MOVE      5000         TO  INTERVAL-CTR                 
    
               END-IF                                                      
    
               DISPLAY  '** CPA KEY = '  WS-PARM-CPA-KEY                   
    
                        ', CHECKPOINT FREQUENCY = '                        
    
                        INTERVAL-CTR                                       
    
               MOVE  WS-PARM-CPA-KEY      TO  PROGRAM-USER-ID              
    
           END-EVALUATE.                                                   
    
                                                                           
    
           COMPUTE  TAB-CTR  =  (PARM-CTR  -  1).                          
    
           MOVE WS-PARM-CARD-2  TO  TAB-PARM-TABLE (TAB-CTR).              
    
           SKIP1                                                           
    
       CA220-EXIT.                                                         
    
           EXIT.                                                           
    
           EJECT                                                           
    
       CA250-PARM-DISPLAY.                                                 
    
                                                                           
    
           IF  TAB-CTR  =  1                                               
    
               DISPLAY  '**   FOR EACH RECORD, UPDATE ACTIONS ARE'         
    
               DISPLAY  '**      POS   LENGTH   NEW VALUE  '               
    
               DISPLAY  '**     ----   ------   ----------------------'    
    
            END-IF.                                                        
    
                                                                           
    
K03        IF  TAB-CTR  =  1  AND                                          
    
K03           TAB-PARM-TABLE (TAB-CTR)  =  SPACES                          
    
K03            DISPLAY  '**      READ-ONLY (NO UPDATE ACTIONS '            
    
K03            DISPLAY  '**         PROVIDED BY PARM CARDS '               
    
K03            SET READ-MODE TO TRUE                                       
    
K03          ELSE                                                          
    
K03            SET UPD-MODE  TO TRUE                                       
    
            END-IF.                                                        
    
                                                                           
    
           IF TAB-PARM-TABLE (TAB-CTR)  =  SPACES                          
    
              GO  TO  CA250-EXIT                                           
    
            END-IF.                                                        
    
                                                                           
    
           EVALUATE  TAB-PARM-VAL (TAB-CTR)                                
    
              WHEN   '='                                                   
    
                 MOVE  TAB-PARM-CHAR-STRING  (TAB-CTR)  TO  X              
    
              WHEN   SPACES                                                
    
                 MOVE  'SPACES'                         TO  X              
    
              WHEN   '0'                                                   
    
                 MOVE  'ZEROES'                         TO  X              
    
           END-EVALUATE.                                                   
    
                                                                           
    
           DISPLAY  '**     '  TAB-PARM-POS  (TAB-CTR)                     
    
                    '     '    TAB-PARM-L    (TAB-CTR)                     
    
                    '   '      X.                                          
    
       CA250-EXIT.                                                         
    
           EXIT.                                                           
    
           EJECT                                                           
    
           SKIP1                                                           
    
       CA300-DISPLAY-COUNTERS.                                             
    
           SKIP1                                                           
    
           PERFORM CA310-MOVE-COUNTERS           THRU CA310-EXIT.          
    
           DISPLAY     COUNTS-HEADER.                                      
    
           DISPLAY  '  DB READ CTR '                                       
    
                 DB-READ-CTR-P.                                            
    
           DISPLAY  '  DB UPD CTR  '                                       
    
                 DB-UPD-CTR-P.                                             
    
           SKIP1                                                           
    
       CA300-EXIT.                                                         
    
           EXIT.                                                           
    
           EJECT                                                           
    
       CA310-MOVE-COUNTERS.                                                
    
           SKIP1                                                           
    
           MOVE  DB-READ-CTR                                               
    
             TO  DB-READ-CTR-P.                                            
    
           MOVE  DB-UPD-CTR                                                
    
             TO  DB-UPD-CTR-P.                                             
    
           SKIP1                                                           
    
       CA310-EXIT.                                                         
    
           EXIT.

Go ahead and take the project.  Datacom is fairly easy to work with and you'll
pick it up quick.  I had never seen it until 9 years ago and it took me a few
days to remember the order of the parameters for the call.  Once I did that it
was smooth sailing.

download it) look for the calls.

##### ↳ ↳ Re: COBOL - Datacom help

- **From:** "Charles Hottel" <chottel@cpcug.org>
- **Date:** 2003-07-18T02:48:02+00:00
- **Newsgroups:** comp.lang.cobol
- **Message-ID:** `<01c34cd6$fe2bc6e0$3ec2f943@chottel>`
- **References:** `<3f16a68e$0$6533$afc38c87@sisyphus.news.be.easynet.net> <20030717222616.18214.00000089@mb-m17.aol.com>`

```
Sorry that was the only program I had handy and she said it was urgent. I
won't be back in the office until Monday to get something more reasonable.
Here is what a typical call looks like:

      MOVE HEAD-CASE-NUMBER            TO FGA01-CASE-NBR           0001162 
                                               FGAK1-CASE-NBR.         
0001163 
           MOVE 'FGAK1' TO FGA-KEY-NAME.                               
0001164 
           MOVE 'LOCKX' TO FGA-CMD.                                    
0001165 
           CALL 'DBNTRY' USING DB-USERID                               
0001166 
                               FGA-REQ-AREA                            
0001167 
                               FGA01-RECORD                            
0001168 
                               FGA-ELEMENT.                            
0001169 
           IF FGA-RETURN = SPACES OR                                   
0001170 
              FGA-RETURN = '14'                                        
0001171 
               GO TO 307-EXIT                                          
0001172 
           ELSE                                                        
0001173 
               MOVE FGA-RETURN TO DBERR-CODE                           
0001174 
               MOVE 'FGA' TO DBERR-FILE                                
0001175 
               MOVE FGA-CMD TO DBERR-CMD                               
0001176 
               MOVE FGA-KEY-NAME TO DBERR-KEYID                        
0001177 
               MOVE FGA-KEY-VALUE TO DBERR-KEYVAL                      
0001178 
               DISPLAY ' '                                             
0001179 
               DISPLAY DB-ERROR-MESSAGE                                
0001180 
               DISPLAY ' '                                             
0001181 
               MOVE 16 TO RETURN-CODE                                  
0001182 
               PERFORM 875-PRINT-STATISTICS THRU 875-EXIT              
0001183 
               GOBACK.                                                 
0001184 

There are four paramters. First is usually the program name. Second is the
request area. It contains the command, the key name, the key value, the
return code etc. The third parm is the record layout. The last parm is the
element. Most of the time there is only one element e.g. for the FGA table
it would be FGA01. We put filler at the end of the record to allow for
expansion but sometimes we run out. Then you can create a second element
e.g. FGA02. Think of this as one logical record with two physical pieces.
You can retrieve them together if you want or separately. Anyway that is a
pretty rare occurence. Most commands require all four parms but not all of
them do. I have a sheet that lists the commands and another that lists the
return codes. I have some documentation. If you are interested in it I can
make a copy and mail it to you. Send me your address off newsgroup.

- **References:** `<3f16a68e$0$6533$afc38c87@sisyphus.news.be.easynet.net> <qYIRa.60411$3o3.3996561@bgtnsc05-news.ops.worldnet.att.net>`

```
The orginal Datacom was more navigational. Read key greater than (REDKG),
read next (REDNX), read key exact for update (RDUKX) etc. Then they had
something called set at a time processing. We never used that much and I
was told it was because of poor performance, but I don't know if that was
true. Now days if your tables are defined correctly i.e. according to some
restrictions, like no 88 levels (condition names) then there is a SQL
interface that you can use. Again I have not used that. Some of our tables
have numbers of records in the hundreds of millions and we get good
performance using primarily the navigational approach.

Harley <dennis.harleyNoSpam@worldnet.att.net> wrote in article

#### ↳ Re: COBOL - Datacom help

- **From:** hhinman <member30421@dbforums.com>
- **Date:** 2003-07-18T02:45:07+00:00
- **Newsgroups:** comp.lang.cobol
- **Message-ID:** `<3124833.1058496307@dbforums.com>`
- **References:** `<3f16a68e$0$6533$afc38c87@sisyphus.news.be.easynet.net>`

```

Nancy,
   I don't have any Datacom examples handly but many years I helped a
   large customerwith Datacom trying to execute these applications on
   the PC by writing a Datacom emulator. The first thing  you need to
   determine is how they are using Datacom. Now this was quite a while
   back, but at the time Datacom came in two different flavors. One was
   the more modern SQL like relational interface which is not what I was
   working with. The other was kind of a generic file handler where you
   called it with the name of a file, an index (key) identifer and value
   and a record area. It was a static call api in all instances. So you
   might want to see if you can find out which interface is required.
Good Luck,
-Howard
```

<a id="t-a359a8fa92"></a>
## Thread: Fortress COBOL - some conclusions — 146 this month / 157 total

### Fortress COBOL - some conclusions

- **From:** "Peter E.C. Dashwood" <dashwood@enternet.co.nz>
- **Date:** 2003-07-18T12:20:29+12:00
- **Newsgroups:** comp.lang.cobol
- **Message-ID:** `<3f173df9_3@news.athenanews.com>`

```
First up, I'd like to thank everyone who posted to the thread. (Especially
those who managed to remain on topic for more than 50 milliseconds <G>).

I believe it is possible to at least get some insight into what causes
"Fortress COBOL", why it manifests itself, and why it is continuing to do
so. The posts to the thread and to CLC in general have been helpful in this
regard.

Here's what I see...(If you feel that these generalizations do not apply to
you, that's good.)

1. The general morale of mainframe people is low.

They feel they are under attack and watch in dismay as their jobs are moved
off-shore. Less and less development work is being placed on the mainframe,
the people who work in this area are perceived as "dinosaurs", and much of
the real value of mainframe implementation is either ignored or dismissed as
"mainframe bashing". There is little or no acknowledgement of the value of
mainframes and mainframers, by management, or colleagues who work in
Client/Server.

(I was surprised by the defensiveness exhibited. I made a tongue-in-cheek
comment about response times under TSO and it prompted a number of serious
posts defending something that didn't need to be defended...It was a joke,
but it seems people are losing their sense of humour...)

2. Management are perceived to be not interested in furthering the careers
of mainframe people.

Training is not being implemented for mainframers. But the same seems not to
be true for Client/Server people who mostly get what they need. This is part
of the management perception that they need this technology only until such
time as it can be replaced.

3. There is little new or "sexy" happening in the mainframe arena. (Note:
moves to Linux and Java, although technically mainframe activities, are
viewed with suspicion by many.) Nobody knows what Websphere is
about...<G>.(We haven't had a single thread on this in CLC...)

4. Maybe as a result of the general low morale, there is a high degree of
inertia being exhibited by many mainframers. Motivation to expand the skill
set has never been more necessary than at the moment, yet the majority are
doing nothing about increasing their value. Some see this as the
responsibility of their Management (it certainly was in the "old" days),
others feel that the job ends at 5pm (as long as they still have a job...).
On the other hand, there are some who are doing everything they can, even
though they may be past the mid point of their careers, to acquire new
skills and try to improve their value. Sadly, they are a minority.

5. Legacy Management is perceived as a "dead end" management role and the
bright young managers don't want to be there. The ones who are there tend to
be doing a holding action. Keep the costs right down, keep the machines
running until we can replace them. Investment in this area cannot be
justified, but don't tell the staff that.... (We have seen many examples of
short-sighted management action posted in CLC...usually from the point of
view of the people affected by it and not specifically as an example of bad
management, but easily interpolated to be such.)

Given all of the above, it is hardly surprising that people dig themselves
into entrenched positions. The result is the "Fortress", where change is
fiercely resisted and anything that challenges the Status Quo is attacked
overtly and covertly.

So what is the outlook? Can the war be won? Can the Fortress withstand the
tides of change sweeping through the industry?

In a word: No.

The computer boom is over. (It started ending in the 1980s). The days when
experts were required to get computers to do anything are finished. The
population is becoming more and more computer literate. Kids are growing up
with computer technology that they take for granted just like all the other
technology of the 21st century. The veils of mystery have been ripped away
and what was once a secret arcane art is now the preserve of spotty
adolescents.

There is no longer a secure job for life in being possessed of some
specialist knowledge (like, how to write COBOL).

(If it's any consolation, there isn't in knowing how to write any procedural
language. There might not be in anything computer related...or maybe the
days of secure jobs for life are just gone forever, no matter what you do
(maybe brain or heart surgery, or medicine in general has a future, but
computing certainly doesn't have the future it had in the 1960s and 70s...))

But that doesn't mean that we should all chuck it in <G>.

It simply means an adjustment to our expectations.

The factors that nurture the Fortress mentality are going to be with us for
some time (about 12 years, I reckon <G>) so individuals may want to think
about this and see what they can personally do to improve their own
situation. Get trained, get more strings to your bow, and get out if you are
going nowhere or the company you are with is simply "waiting to migrate".

Personally, I'm considering a career change...looked at Bank Robbing but I
can't run fast enough and I never liked firearms even when I was in the
army... (noisy, dangerous, things...).

I'm a bit too old for "Would you like fries with that?" so I am coming to
the conclusion that the only safe option for me is a rich widow or spinster.

Anyone got a sister on the shelf with a trust fund?

Pete.
```

#### ↳ Re: Fortress COBOL - some conclusions

- **From:** "Howard Brazee" <howard@brazee.net>
- **Date:** 2003-07-18T15:05:46+00:00
- **Newsgroups:** comp.lang.cobol

###### ↳ ↳ ↳ Re: Fortress COBOL - some conclusions

- **From:** robert@wagner.net (Robert Wagner)
- **Date:** 2003-07-19T02:39:54+00:00
- **Newsgroups:** comp.lang.cobol
- **Message-ID:** `<3f18aee8.2789145@news.optonline.com>`
- **References:** `<3f173df9_3@news.athenanews.com> <bf92ca$gou$1@peabody.colorado.edu> <zCYRa.61501$0v4.4107283@bgtnsc04-news.ops.worldnet.att.net>`

```
"Harley" <dennis.harleyNoSpam@worldnet.att.net> wrote:

>
>"Howard Brazee" <howard@brazee.net> wrote in message
…[13 more quoted lines elided]…
>Don't VB/Delphi/C++,etc. programmers get a premium for their skills?

No. VB, C++ and Java are the most common skills, thus are low paying. 

Indian schools are training people in IBM mainframe skills: COBOL, CICS, DB2,
the usual tools. Outsourcing companies are claiming CMM-5 certification, which
would appeal to mainframe managers. Your job has been targeted. 

High paying jobs for mainframers go to  those with experience on arcane
specialized tools or applications. HIPPA (health claims) is hot now because the
Feds mandated all States change their systems. It'll play out in a year. AFS
(Alltel Financial System) is in demand; there must be new developments in
loan-sharking.  Another hot skill is Merva SWIFT, an EDI format for financial
transactions. Life insurance packages show up now and then, not the well known
ones such as Vantage and Life 70, rather ones you never heard of. Peoplesoft and
SAP were hot a few years ago, not so much any longer. 

DBA jobs consistently pay above average and are easy to find. If money and
security are your  _only_ objectives, become a DBA. Companies don't like to farm
out jobs considered Strategic. 

>It seems to make more sense to replace a high per hour cost with a low per
>hour cost.

The criterion is risk. Mission Critical and Strategic applications will be the
last to go overseas. 

>The low cost locations still have a limited pool of talent to draw from, so
>high per hour skills would seem to be a sound business/personal decision.

There is a nearly limitless pool of talent. India is just the beginning. Look
for Eastern Europe and Russia to enter the market.
```

##### ↳ ↳ Re: Fortress COBOL - some conclusions

- **From:** "Peter E.C. Dashwood" <dashwood@enternet.co.nz>
- **Date:** 2003-07-19T13:09:09+12:00
- **Newsgroups:** comp.lang.cobol
- **Message-ID:** `<3f189ad7_3@news.athenanews.com>`
- **References:** `<3f173df9_3@news.athenanews.com> <bf92ca$gou$1@peabody.colorado.edu>`

```

"Howard Brazee" <howard@brazee.net> wrote in message
news:bf92ca$gou$1@peabody.colorado.edu...
>
> On 17-Jul-2003, "Peter E.C. Dashwood" <dashwood@enternet.co.nz> wrote:
…[3 more quoted lines elided]…
> > They feel they are under attack and watch in dismay as their jobs are
moved
> > off-shore.
>
> Interesting.   It is much easier to move jobs for PCs off-shore.

Yes, I would've thought so, too Howard.

I think this IS happening, but the readers of this forum are more focussed
on COBOL.

Let's face it, COBOL is a very easy skill to acquire and is ideally suited
for anyone of average intelligence, who speaks English, and is capable of
logical thought.

I have trained many COBOL programmers in my career, usually run a two week
class that gets them off the ground then get them working with an
experienced programmer for 6 months and they're away... The majority had
never considered "computer programming" as a career.

I think the more modern skills are not so immediately intuitive as COBOL and
it will therefore take a bit longer before this filters through to the
sub-continent. Nevertheless, the academic institutions there will be
teaching computer science as we speak, and I'm sure there are many C++, VB,
Java, and Web-skilled people just waiting for contracts.

The other important point here is that most of these languages never went
through the COBOL boom  up to the 80s. Expectations are not so high. (Young
programmers in the West, just out of college, are not expecting to make $60
an hour, even using the latest tools and languages.)

Companies in the West are also going to be more carfeul about letting
perceived "cutting edge" technology go off-shore. (This is really stupid but
it comes down to perception at management level, not necessarily technical
reality.) Until the in-house IT shops stop doing development (and I mean
writing applications from the ground up, as has been traditionally done),
this fear will remain.

As "development" comes to mean package configuration, component juggling,
and managing out-sourced requirements, there will be less aversion to it
being done off-shore or anywhere else. As the "development" responsibility
and capability slowly devolves back to the individual User Departments,
there will be less need to go outside the Company, let alone off-shore.

The "Asian Programming Boom" may not be of long duration. It can only last
as long as the need for "programming" lasts.

Pete.
```

#### ↳ Re: Fortress COBOL - some conclusions

- **From:** LX-i <LXi0007@Netscape.net>
- **Date:** 2003-07-18T18:30:16-05:00

- **Message-ID:** `<vhh0ognov16g35@corp.supernews.com>`

- **References:** `<3f173df9_3@news.athenanews.com>`

```
Peter E.C. Dashwood wrote:

> 4. Maybe as a result of the general low morale, there is a high degree of
> inertia being exhibited by many mainframers. Motivation to expand the skill
…[6 more quoted lines elided]…
> skills and try to improve their value. Sadly, they are a minority.

You know, Pete, this might not be a bad thing.  If jobs are becoming 
scarcer, those of us who care about continuing our careers will rise to 
the top, and the people who just do their 9-to-5 and out will drop by 
the wayside.  :)

> 5. Legacy Management is perceived as a "dead end" management role and the
> bright young managers don't want to be there. The ones who are there tend to
…[5 more quoted lines elided]…
> management, but easily interpolated to be such.)

This point intrigued me.  Of course, I'm in a slightly non-corporate 
environment (although they keep trying to be like one).  We've had a 
Capt, and now a 1Lt in charge of our project over the last year and a 
half, instead of the traditional seasoned GS-13 types we'd had for a 
long time.  These younger (both prior enlisted, but still younger than 
the previous folks) officers are bringing fresh insights to our office.

We have a "pet project" in the organization that all object-oriented, 
Oracle/Java based, blah blah blah.  It's had some major problems (mostly 
due to bad/changing requirements), and the amount of code they've got 
versus the amount of time they've spent isn't too great.  Our management 
is also over this project, although they've got someone actually running 
it day-to-day for them.

These young officers actually listen to us, even come to us and ask us 
what we're doing, what we think we should be doing, where we should be 
headed, etc.  We've been able to show him some really cool things on the 
mainframe, and just last week we finally got the -customer- (through our 
suggesting) to load the current release of the HMP IX operating system 
(8.0).  This release has a relational database server with most any 
function you'd want, and the web server that comes with it supports JSP! 
  There's built-in ODBC and JDBC access to this relational database 
server.  All the technologies they say they want (and have to go to Sun 
to get), we can give them on -existing- hardware!

It's actually a pretty exciting time - of course, getting the go-ahead 
to make this happen is making us put our money where our mouth is...  :)

> The factors that nurture the Fortress mentality are going to be with us for
> some time (about 12 years, I reckon <G>) so individuals may want to think

There's that magic number again...  12-level data items, 12 years left 
for FC (fortress COBOL) - Would your favorite number happen to be 12?
```

"LX-i" <LXi0007@Netscape.net> wrote in message
news:vhh0ognov16g35@corp.supernews.com...

>
> > 4. Maybe as a result of the general low morale, there is a high degree
of

skill

are
> > doing nothing about increasing their value. Some see this as the
> > responsibility of their Management (it certainly was in the "old" days),

job...).
